introSection: Big Dipper is a wooden roller coaster built by John Collins. It was located at Expo '58 in Belgium. It operated from 17 April 1958 to 19 October 1958.
fullText: Big Dipper is a wooden roller coaster built by John Collins. It was located at Expo '58 in Belgium. It operated from 17 April 1958 to 19 October 1958.
